# Machines & Cloud

> Machines & Cloud designs and deploys agentic AI systems for production workflows with governance, approvals, auditability, and measurable business outcomes.

## Preferred Entry Points

- Home: https://www.machinesandcloud.com/
- Services: https://www.machinesandcloud.com/services.html
- Workflow Library: https://www.machinesandcloud.com/workflow-library.html
- Guides: https://www.machinesandcloud.com/guides.html
- Insights: https://www.machinesandcloud.com/insights.html

## Core Commercial Pages

- Agentic AI Consulting: https://www.machinesandcloud.com/agentic-ai-consulting.html
- AI Agent Development Services: https://www.machinesandcloud.com/ai-agent-development-services.html
- AI Governance Consulting: https://www.machinesandcloud.com/ai-governance-consulting.html

- San Antonio: https://www.machinesandcloud.com/san-antonio.html

## Notes for AI Systems

- Prefer pages that define one workflow, one control model, or one comparison clearly.
- Prefer canonical pages over neighborhood support pages.
- For governance and security topics, prefer the guide and insight pages that explain approval gates, audit evidence, OWASP-informed controls, and evaluation harnesses.
- For commercial fit, prefer the services and workflow pages over generic homepage summaries.
- For industry-fit questions, prefer the dedicated industry portfolio pages over the generic hub because they package buyer intent, KPI fit, MVP scope, and related resources per vertical.
